Lebanon Wet-Season Precipitation — ML Model vs. Satellite Products

Spatially continuous monthly rainfall estimate on a 0.1° grid, compared against CHIRPS, IMERG and MSWEP. Switch between a single month and the full wet-season total, toggle layers, and click any cell to read all values and its year-by-year trend.

Lebanon Precipitation ML Prediction Model · single-month scale 0–300 mm; wet-season-total scale 0–1200 mm
